A '''Yootak''' was a dangerous predator on [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] and [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] hunting prey. It had green fur and two long arms. On its hands were three long fingers with long and sharp claws. Its mouth was full of razor-sharp teeth.<ref name="EBB">{{JournalCite|1|Escape from Balis-Baurgh}}</ref>

{{Creature-stub}}
